Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With Initial Demand For Physical Examination And For The Imposition Of Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Jan-24-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant San Francisco Bay Area Rapid Transit and City and County of San Francisco's motion to compel compliance with demand for a physical examination is Granted. Plaintiff is ordered to contact counsel for defendant to reschedule the examination. The examination shall be completed by February 11, 2008. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $1,020 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.
